feedback_files.tests/test_archive_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def database():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    for name in ("ticket_lifecycle.sql", "project_dashboard.sql"):
        connection.executescript((ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return connection


def test_archive_and_restore_adjust_the_stored_count():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO project VALUES (1, 'Renewals')")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO ticket VALUES (1, 1, 'Call customer', '2026-08-02', NULL)")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO ticket VALUES (2, 1, 'Prepare quote', '2026-08-04', NULL)")

    db.execute("UPDATE ticket SET archived_at = '2026-07-12T09:00:00Z' WHERE ticket_id = 1")
    assert db.execute("SELECT open_ticket_count FROM project_metrics WHERE project_id = 1").fetchone()[0] == 1

    db.execute("UPDATE ticket SET archived_at = NULL WHERE ticket_id = 1")
    assert db.execute("SELECT open_ticket_count FROM project_metrics WHERE project_id = 1").fetchone()[0] == 2


def test_dashboard_ignores_due_dates_from_archived_tickets():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO project VALUES (1, 'Renewals')")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO ticket VALUES (1, 1, 'Old task', '2026-07-01', '2026-07-10T12:00:00Z')")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO ticket VALUES (2, 1, 'Live task', '2026-08-04', NULL)")

    row = db.execute("SELECT open_ticket_count, next_due_on FROM project_dashboard WHERE project_id = 1").fetchone()
    assert row == (1, '2026-08-04')
